summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of Mezzora Pizza showcase website. All major features tested including Homepage, Header navigation, Hero CTA, About section, Rubrics (Menu/Formules/Offres), Reviews carousel, Contact form, Footer, and mobile responsiveness. Fixed critical contact form submission bug (HTTP redirect issue).

minor.issue: 307 redirect to HTTP instead of HTTPS causing Mixed Content error in browser. Fixed by adding trailing slash in frontend request.

integration_issues.issue: Was failing due to HTTP redirect - FIXED by adding trailing slash to API endpoint

action_items: Consider removing old e-commerce pages (CheckoutPage.js, AdminDashboard.js, OrderConfirmationPage.js) from src/pages/ since they are no longer used
critical_code_review_comments: Old e-commerce pages (CheckoutPage.js, AdminDashboard.js, OrderConfirmationPage.js) still exist in /app/frontend/src/pages/ but are not routed - consider removing them to clean up codebase
The 'cart' text detection was false positive - 'Notre Carte' contains 'Carte' which matched 'cart' substring but there are no actual cart/shopping elements
test_credentials: No credentials needed - public showcase website
seed_data_creation: Test contact messages created via API and form submission
context_for_next_testing_agent: All main features verified working: Homepage loads all sections (Hero, About, Rubrics, Reviews, Contact, Footer), Header navigation works on desktop and mobile, Hero CTA buttons link to tel:0147494904, About section shows 3 value cards, Rubrics show 3 clickable cards that open respective content (Menu with category tabs, Formules Midi without cart buttons, Offres without pizza content), Reviews carousel has navigation arrows and dots with real-looking French names, Contact form submits successfully via POST /api/contact/, Footer shows restaurant info. No e-commerce/cart functionality present as expected.
tests_passed: Header desktop navigation (Accueil, Notre Carte, Formules Midi, Offres, Contact, Itinéraire, Phone CTA)
About section 'Notre Histoire' with 3 cards (Pâte Fraîche, Ingrédients Frais, 28 Ans)
Rubrics section 3 clickable cards (Notre Carte, Formules Midi, Offres Spéciales)
Notre Carte shows menu with category tabs (Base Tomate, Base Crème, BBQ, etc)
No 'add to cart' buttons in menu
Formules Midi shows 4 lunch formulas WITHOUT cart buttons
Offres Spéciales shows ONLY offers (2+1 deal, prices) WITHOUT pizza content
Reviews carousel with real names (Marie L., Thomas D., etc), initials, stars, navigation
Contact section: phone banner, contact form, info cards, Google Maps
Contact form submission works via POST /api/contact/
Footer shows restaurant info, hours, contact with warm brown background
